labels: Helmholtz Centre for Polar and Marine Research
Alfred Wegener Institute for Polar and Marine Research
Alfred-Wegener-Institut Helmholtz-Zentrum für Polar- und Meeresforschung
description: The Alfred Wegener Institute, Helmholtz Centre for Polar and Marine Research (AWI), is a German research centre based in Bremerhaven and a member of the Helmholtz Association. Its work spans polar climate, sea ice, marine biogeochemistry, and Earth system modelling, and it develops the FESOM ocean model used in the AWI-CM and AWI-ESM coupled climate models contributed to CMIP.
